series_metadata.series_description: Requests to Continue Unitization Hearing Dates or Times.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 2 years after an Order is issued on the application or request for amendment or 2 years after an application is withdrawn. If records are scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may be shredded at that time. ; Electronic: 2 years after an Order is issued on the application or request for amendment or 2 years after an application is withdrawn., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
